meaning: n.[摄]密度计量学(研究摄影负片密度测量和结果数据的解释)
examples: Densitometry was used to calculate peak particle diameters.
Of those exposed to inhaled corticosteroids, 23% of women and 4% of men underwent bone densitometry.
Graphic technology - Graphic arts reflection densitometry measurements - Terminology, equations, image elements and procedures.
